sourcesContent:
import React from "react"; import TaskCard from "./task-card"; const MyTask = ({ selectedTask }) => { if (!selectedTask) return
Select a task to see details
; return (

My Tasks

{selectedTask.title}

Priority:{" "} {selectedTask.priority}

Status: {selectedTask.status}

Created on: {selectedTask.date}

Task Title: {selectedTask.fullTitle}

Objective: {selectedTask.objective}

Task Description: {selectedTask.description}

{selectedTask.notes && (
Additional Notes:
    {selectedTask.notes.map((note, index) => (
  • {note}
    • ))}
)}

Deadline for Submission: {selectedTask.deadline}

); }; export default MyTask;
